ab: Kbrxi ku pila su hug?
en: A: Can you lend me the money?

ab: Iq! Piya kbrxun su?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: Wada ku smhungi madas pila da, tduwa ku kmbarux pila su hug?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Ini ku adas pila uri.
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: Wada ku smhungi madas pila da, tduwa ku kmbarux pila su hug?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Uxay, ini su bqani knan ka knbrxan su na.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: Tduwa ku kmbarux lukus su hug?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: Iq! Ngali nanaq.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: Tduwa ku kmbarux patas su hug?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: Wada mu kbrxun Ciwas da.
en: B: I lent it to Ciwas.

ab: Kbrxi knan ka ddeynsya su hug?
ch: A:(請)借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle?

ab: Iq! Asi su ka yahun mhaduc kusun.
ch: B: 好，你明天一定要送還喔!
en: B: Okay, you have to return it tomorrow!

ab: Qmuyux da, ini ku adas bubung, kbrxi ku bubung hug?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: Kingal balay ka bubung mu, supu ta mubung hug?
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: Knbrxan su knan snduray ka patas nii, bqanun misu da.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: Mqmita su meenu patas o rngagi ku.
en: B: Tell me what else you want to read.

ab: Bqanun misu knuwan ka pila?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: Ini huya! Mduuy su do bqani ku da.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It doesn't matter, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: Bqanun su knan knuwan ka knbrxan su pila da?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: Bqanu misu kusun da.
ch: B:我明天還你。/我明天送來。
en: A: I'll return it to you tomorrow. /I'll send it tomorrow.

ab: Bqanun su knan knuwan ka knbrxan su patas da?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: Wada su bqanan shiga dhmi?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?/我昨天已經還你了啊?
en: A: I paid you back yesterday, didn't I? /I gave it back to you yesterday, didn't I?

ab: Kuras ka knbarux sunan ppatas nii hug?
en: A: Did Kuras lend you this pen?

ab: Iq! Knbrxan mu hiya jiyax sayang.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: Knbrxan su Kuras ka ppatas nii hug?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Kuras?

ab: Uxay! Bnarig bubu ka nii.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: Ungac da cimu, usa kmbarux cikuh cimu Pitay.
en: A: We are out of salt, let's borrow some from Pitay.

ab: Ena, musa ku kmbarux.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: Sai rmngaw ka Pitay, haduc ka pila knbrxan su ksa.
en: B: Go and ask Pitay to pay me back.

ab: Piya ka knbrxan na pila.
en: A: How much does she owe you?
